creator: freebsd-ports@charlieroot.de
text:
All versions are security releases and contain important security fixes - read the corresponding security advisories here:

https://typo3.org/security/advisory/typo3-core-sa-2024-007
https://typo3.org/security/advisory/typo3-core-sa-2024-008
https://typo3.org/security/advisory/typo3-core-sa-2024-009
https://typo3.org/security/advisory/typo3-core-sa-2024-010

For details about the releases, please see:

https://typo3.org/article/typo3-1311-12415-and-11537-security-releases-published
